nasb.text: The workmanship of the wheels was like the workmanship of a chariot wheel. Their axles, their rims, their spokes, and their hubs were all cast.

esv.text: The wheels were made like a chariot wheel; their axles, their rims, their spokes, and their hubs were all cast.

cnv.text: 輪子的形狀，好像車輪的做法，輪軸、輪輞、輪輻、輪轂都是鑄成的。

ccb.text: 轮子的样式像战车的轮子，轴、辋、辐、毂都是铸成的。
